journal_entry.description: Purchase machinery for factory expansion with installation costs
journal_entry.rationale: Under IAS 16, the cost of PP&E includes purchase price plus all costs directly attributable to bringing the asset to the location and condition necessary for its intended use. Freight, installation, and testing/commissioning are capitalizable costs. The machinery purchase on account creates a liability (Accounts Payable), while the additional costs paid by cheque reduce Cash. All costs are capitalized to the machinery asset account.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Machinery purchase with capitalizable installation costs. Total cost = $700k + $30k + $20k + $50k = $800k. HST 13% on all amounts = $104k recoverable. Accounts Payable for machinery purchase ($700k + $91k HST = $791k), Cash paid for freight/installation/testing ($100k + $13k HST = $113k). One asset increase (machinery), one liability increase (A/P), one asset decrease (Cash).
